structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2024-12-20 Investor Update: Bayview 2nd Home
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2024-12-20 16:46:03-07:00

	
		
 


Investor Update: Bayview 2nd Home
NCM-P-2024-12-20

 

 

ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Capital Markets is excited to announce the addition of Bayview’s 2nd home program.  This is a delegated best effort option with reduced 2nd Home LLPAs vs standard agency.  

 

Program Highlights (2nd Home)

*	LTV

	*	90% Purchase & Rate/Term refinance
	*	75% Cash-Out refinance

*	1-unit only
*	660 min fico (Best Effort)
*	Temporary buydowns not allowed
*	DTI per AUS (DU)

 

 

Check out this Pricing*!

 



 

 

* Scenario based on a corporate branch LO with 135bps LO Comp

 

 

 

Attachments:

*	Program Guidelines
*	SM Graphic

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting (jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product (ProductDept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:ProductDept@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk (lock.desk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> )

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To view previous Communications, follow this path: Novanet > Products & UW > 2024 NOVA Communication > Product
